texto: There's only one good reason to be a writer-we can't help it! We'd all like to be successful rich and famous but if those are our goals we're off on the wrong foot. ... I just wanted to earn enough money so I could work at home on my writing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Phyllis Whitney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “There's only one good reason to be a writer-we can't help it! We'd all like to be successful rich…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, motivation, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao.
